lines.text: Abstract. We present FElasticHash, a novel approach for high-quality,
lines.text_display: Abstract. We present FElasticHash, a novel approach for high-quality,

lines.text: efficient, and large-scale semantic image similarity search. It is based on a
lines.text_display: efficient, and large-scale semantic image similarity search. It is based on a

lines.text: deep hashing model to learn hash codes for fine-grained image similarity
lines.text_display: deep hashing model to learn hash codes for fine-grained image similarity

lines.text: search in natural images and a two-stage method for efficiently searching

lines.text: binary hash codes using Elasticsearch (ES). In the first stage, a coarse
lines.text_display: binary hash codes using Elasticsearch (ES). In the first stage, a coarse

lines.text: and ES terms lookup of neighboring hash codes. In the second stage, the
